title: Linux Cryptominer Activity Detected
description: Detects execution of known cryptomining software or command patterns associated with unauthorized cryptocurrency mining on compromised hosts.
query: ('Log Source' = 'SOC Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Secure Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Audit Logs') and (((msg like '*xmrig*' or msg like '*minerd*' or msg like '*cpuminer*' or msg like '*stratum+tcp*' or msg like '*stratum+ssl*' or msg like '*cryptonight*' or msg like '*--donate-level*')))
